assessor_1_raw: Sepsis EWS design: label backdating to earliest charted value is appropriate for retrospective labeling. 6-hour prediction anchor is conservative and anti-leakage. Negative case anchor at pre-discharge is standard. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Onset ambiguity cases (>2 hours uncertainty) are retained but flagged for sensitivity analysis. This is correct - exclusion would select only clear-cut cases, biasing toward easier predictions. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Irregularly sampled time series with positional encoding for timestamps is appropriate for clinical EHR data. The transformer architecture handles irregular intervals better than fixed-interval models. Verdict: defense_wins.
